Appearances:
Jeff Margulies, Esq. for Plaintiff Elias Bencomo.
Laura Carter, Esq. representing the Defendant Sonia Mendieta through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: David Yang, litigant(s) and counsel confer privately in Room 502-A,
for settlement discussions.

Case settled, Trial Date vacated.

Ntc Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sonia Mendieta, 415-336-1999, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona
Brenda Mendieta, 510-219-3490 interpreter for defendant and moving party
Joe Bravo, Esq. 415-860-4595 for plaintiff and opposing party Elias Bencomo

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SONIA MENDIETA'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST FILE HER PROPOSED ANSWER BY JANUARY 19, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
